def positive_object_construction_triggers_network_or_disk_side_effect():
    rule_id = "object_construction_triggers_network_or_disk_side_effect"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag constructors that perform expensive I/O instead of separating configuration from execution."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
